meta.title: Pokemon Type Master Reference (Enhanced)
meta.description: AI-friendly master reference for Pokémon type classifications. Dual-types are listed under both type groups. Includes National Dex numbers, regional form flags, legendary/mythical tagging, and biome tags.

ai_assistant_directive.text: This document serves as the master reference for Pokémon type classifications. When building themed trainer parties, designing biome-specific encounter tables, or generating typed loot, use these lists to select appropriate Pokémon.
ai_assistant_directive.dual_type_note: Pokémon with two types are listed under BOTH of their respective type categories. Always cross-reference with the master pokemon.txt PBS file if a newly added regional variant or custom Pokémon is not explicitly listed here.
